files.notes: This file contains two distinct sections: a Home Gardening article focused on seed preparation and planting advice, followed by Notes from the Field which includes mission reports and ends with a brief item about cement water tanks. The boundary between sections is clear where 'Notes from the Field' begins after the gardening content.

splits.start_boundary: Guide Lessons. Lesson I. Work and Business.

files.notes: The file contains an Editorial section followed by Guide Lessons. The Editorial discusses human independence/dependence and the grain saving mission given to President Emmeline B. Wells. The Guide Lessons section includes Lesson I on Work and Business (Theology and Testimony) covering The Law of Faith, and Lesson III on Genealogy covering The Mission and Spirit of Elijah. The text appears to cut off mid-sentence in the Guide Lessons section.

files.notes: This file contains four distinct lesson sections from the Guide Lessons department: Theology/Testimony (Faith), Genealogy (Elijah), Home Ethics (Obedience), and Art. Each lesson has clear subject headings, content, and questions sections that mark the boundaries between lessons.
